sections.sectionTitle: Esau tawh Kimu Dingin Jakob Kiging

verses.text: Jakob zong ama lampi-ah paisuak a, Pasian' vantung mite in amah na dawn hi
Jakob in amaute a muh ciangin amah in, “Hihte, Pasian' galkapte!,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen Mahanaim, ci-in min a phuak hi
Jakob in Edom gam, Seir leitangah a om a sanggampa Esau kiangah kamtaite ma sawl a
amaute hilhin, “Note in ka topa Esau kiangah hih bangin na ci ding uh hi: Na nasempa Jakob in, ‘Laban' kiangah peemta-in tu ciangdong ka om hi
Keimah in bawngtal, la, tuuhon, nasem pasal, leh nasem numeite ka nei hi. Na mai-ah maipha ka muh theihna dingin ka topa tungah a gen dingin kong sawl hi, ci hi’, ci un,” a ci hi
Kamtaite, Jakob kiangah hong ciahkik uh a, “Na sanggampa Esau kiangah ka va pai uh hi. Nangmah a dawn dingin amah hong pai a, amah tawh mihing za li om hi,” ci-in hong gen uh hi
Tua ciangin Jakob nakpi takin lau-in lungkham hi. Amah in ama kianga om mite, tuuhonte, bawnghonte, leh kalaohte pawl nihin khen a
“Pawlkhatah Esau pai-in a suksiat leh a pawlkhat suakta ding hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi
Jakob in, “Ka pu Abraham' Pasian leh ka pa Isaac' Pasian, keima kiangah, ‘Na gam leh na behte kiangah ciahkik in; nang' tungah hoihna kong bawl ding hi,’ hong ci Topa aw

kei pen na itna kip khempeuh lak pan a neupen leh na nasempa tunga nong lahsa na thumannate khempeuh tawh ka kilawm kei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka ciangkhut guak tawh hih Jordan ka kantan a, ahi zongin tu-in pawl nih ka cing khinta hi
Ka sanggampa Esau' khutsung pan kei hong khahkhia in, kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah hong pai-in kote khempeuh, nute, naupangte tawh hong thah khit khak ding ka lau hi
Ahih hangin nangmah in, ‘Na tungah hoihna kong bawl ding a, na suanlekhakte tuipi sehnel zahin a honpi a kisim theiloin ka bawl ding hi,’ nong ci hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah tua zanin tua lai-ah giak a, ama neih sung panin a sanggampa Esau-a' ding letsong
keelpi zanih leh keeltal sawmnih, tuupi zanih leh tuutal sawmnih
kalaoh nawisuk sawmthum leh a note, bawngpi sawmli leh bawngtal sawm, lapi sawmnih leh latal sawm a la hi
Amah in hihte a nasemte' khutsungah amau' hon ciatin pia a, ama nasemte kiangah, “Ka mai-ah na paisuak un la, hon khat leh hon khat kikal kihalsak un,” a ci hi
Amah in a masa pente tungah thu hilh a, “Ka sanggampa Esau in note hong dawnin, ‘Kua-a' na hi uh hiam? Koi pana hong pai na hi uh hiam? Na mai uha om hihte kua-a' ahi hiam?’ ci-in hong dot ciangin
note in, ‘Na nasempa Jakob-a' ahi hi. Hihte pen ka topa Esau' tungah letsongin hong kipuak ahi hi. Tua thamloin amah ka nung uhah om hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi
Amah in tua mah bangin a nihna, a thumna, leh ganhing honte a zuite khempeuh kiangah, “Amah tawh na kituah uh ciangin Esau' kiangah a kibangmahin na gen ding uh hi

Note in, ‘Tua thamloin na nasempa Jakob ka nung uhah om hi,’ na ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Ka mai-ah a pai letsong tawh amah ka lungdamsak zo khading a, tua khit ciangin ama maipha ka mu ding hi. Amah in kei hong sang khading hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi
Tua ahih ciangin letsong a piak dingte, ama mai-ah paisak a, amah ahih leh tua zanin giahphualah a giak lai hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Peniel-ah Jakob leh Mi Khat Kilai

verses.text: Tua zan mahin amah tho-in a zi nihte, a nasem numei nihte, leh a ta sawmlekhatte la-in, Jabbok ngahmun a kantan hi
Amah in amaute la-in lui galkhatah puak a, tua mah bangin a neih khempeuh zong a galkah sak hi
Jakob amah guak bek omlai a, zingsang khuavak dong mi khat in amah a lai hi
Tua mipa in Jakob a zawhlohna a theih ciangin amah in a khelkom sung suksak hi. Tua bangin amah tawh a kilaina-in Jakob' khelguh a kilawi hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Khua vak ta ahih ciangin hong khah in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Jakob in, “Kei, thupha nong piak kei leh kong khah kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Amah in, “Na min bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Jakob,” ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Na min Jakob, kici nawnloin Israel, kici ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian leh mite tawh na kilai khinzo a, na zo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jakob in amah dongin, “Na min hong gen in, hong thum ing,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “Bang hanga ka min hong dong na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua lai-ah amah in Jakob thupha a pia hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jakob in tua mun pen Peniel, ci-in min a phuak hi. “Bang hang hiam cih leh maitang kituahin Pasian ka mu khin a, ahi zongin kei hong kihing khawi lai hi,” a ci hi
A khelpi' hangin amah bai kawmin Peniel a kantan laitakin ni hong suak hi
Tua ahih ciangin tuni dongin Israel mite in khelkom tunga a om khel thagui nelo uh hi. Amah in Jakob' khelkom, a khel thagui tung a sukna hang ahi hi.
